subsection.heading: Authority to Use.—
subsection.content: The Secretary may use one-step turnkey selection procedures for the purpose of entering into contracts for construction projects.

subsection.heading: Definitions.—
subsection.chapeau: In this section, the following definitions apply:

paragraph.content: The term “one-step turnkey selection procedures” means procedures used for the selection of a contractor on the basis of price and other evaluation criteria to perform, in accordance with the provisions of a firm fixed-price contract, both the design and construction of a facility using performance specifications supplied by the Secretary.
The term “construction” includes the construction, procurement, development, conversion, or extension of any facility.
The term “facility” means a building, structure, or other improvement to real property.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2018—Pub. L. 115–282 renumbered section 677 of this title as this section.
